sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Nice are in poor form, winless in their last 5 matches with 3 losses and 2 draws, conceding in every game. Olympique Lyonnais, in contrast, have been solid, winning 4 of their last 5 matches, including strong performances in both domestic and European competitions. Lyon's ability to score early (first to score in 10/10 games) gives them an edge.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Lyon have dominated recent head-to-head encounters, winning 3 of the last 5 matchups against Nice, including the last two with convincing scorelines (4-1 and 2-0). Nice have struggled to keep a clean sheet against Lyon, failing to do so in their last 3 meetings.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Nice, sitting 12th with 8 points, have struggled defensively, conceding 12 goals this season (13th in Ligue 1), though they lead the league in corners per game (6.43). Lyon, 4th with 15 points, have a balanced attack and defense, conceding just 5 goals while scoring early in matches, which aligns with their season goal distribution.

sections.subtitle: Key Insights
sections.text: Nice's inability to convert big chances (28.57% conversion rate, 14th in Ligue 1) and Lyon's knack for capitalizing on opportunities make the away side favorites. Sofascore's prediction of a 51% chance for a Lyon win seems justified given their form and historical edge over Nice.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half between Nice and Olympique Lyonnais at the Allianz Riviera ended with a narrow 2-1 lead for the home side. Nice capitalized on their opportunities early and late in the half, finding the net twice to take the advantage. Olympique Lyonnais, despite dominating possession and creating more entries into the final third, managed to score once but couldn't convert their dominance into a level scoreline by the break. The game has been intense, with both teams showing attacking intent, though Nice have been more clinical in front of goal.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance and tactics
halftimeSections.text: Nice have shown a balanced approach in the first half, defending stoutly while striking effectively on the counter. Their ability to win aerial duels has helped them neutralize Lyon’s pressure in key moments. Olympique Lyonnais, on the other hand, have controlled the ball for the majority of the half and have been relentless in pushing into dangerous areas, particularly through the penalty area. However, their finishing has let them down, and they've struggled to break through Nice's compact defensive structure consistently.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players impact
halftimeSections.text: For Nice, Sofiane Diop has been a standout performer, contributing with a goal and an assist, making him a constant threat in attack. Melvin Bard also made a significant impact by scoring early and helping to set the tone for the game. On the Lyon side, Pavel Šulc has been dangerous, finding the net and creating chances with his movement and vision. Ruben Kluivert also contributed with an assist, showing creativity in the final third.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum analysis
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw Lyon start with strong attacking momentum, pushing forward with intent in the opening minutes. Nice responded with a sharp attacking spell around the time of their first goal, briefly seizing control. Lyon then regained momentum, maintaining consistent pressure through much of the middle of the half with sustained attacks. However, Nice struck back with another surge of momentum late in the half, culminating in their second goal. Lyon tried to respond towards the end of the half with renewed energy, but they couldn't level the score before the whistle.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Areas of concern and potential adjustments
halftimeSections.text: For Nice, maintaining defensive discipline will be crucial as Lyon are likely to push even harder in the second half. Their relatively low possession could become a liability if they can't manage the game effectively. Lyon need to improve their finishing and capitalize on the chances they're creating, as their high number of final third entries hasn't yet translated into enough goals. They might look to exploit the flanks more and test Nice's full-backs with pace and width.
